raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue plastic container with a green lid is on the right. Inside it, a green bowl is visible. A red apple sits on the table to the right of the container. A brown bowl is in the center, and a red mug is on the left. The task is to pick up the green bowl from inside the blue container. STRATEGY - First, reach into the blue container to grasp the green bowl. Then, lift it out and transport it to a destination (the table). Finally, place it on the table. Failure modes include not grasping the bowl properly or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the blue container to access the green bowl. Step 2: Grasp the green bowl by its body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the bowl to the table. Step 4: Place the bowl on the table.
Goal: on(green_bowl, table); stable(green_bowl)
Scene: blue_container, green_bowl, red_apple, brown_bowl, red_mug, table
Step 1: reach(blue_container)
  affordance_region: the rim of the blue container
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_container, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_container) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_bowl)
  affordance_region: the body of the green bowl
  contact: holding(green_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_bowl)
Step 3: transport(green_bowl -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  spatial: above(green_bowl, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_bowl)
  done_when: above(green_bowl, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_bowl -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  contact: surface_contact(green_bowl, table) [completion]; released(green_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_bowl, table) AND released(green_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the blue container
the body of the green bowl
an empty area on the table
an empty area on the table
